data.body: CI observation: PR #13 triggered CI but LLM Review check shows 'skipping' — the llm-review job did not run on this PR. Other checks ran (Script Tests failed unrelated, Actionlint/ShellCheck/Hook Tests passed). The security overlay was not triggered because the LLM Review CI job is configured with a condition that caused it to skip on this test branch. This indicates the ci-dso-staged.yml changes that add llm-review as a required check may need further configuration — the job ran but skipped rather than executing the security review. PR state: OPEN, mergeStateStatus: BLOCKED.
